sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55561" key="kata/fullos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάφυλλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n55561.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leafy</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κ. ἀνὰ κήπους</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0508.tlg001:66:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stratt.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
